concerns.text: Task T026 implements 'run_paired_wilcoxon' (Paired Wilcoxon Signed-Rank). This contradicts Spec FR-004 and SC-001 which explicitly mandate 'independent-sample statistical significance testing (Welch's t-test or Mann-Whitney U)' and forbid paired tests. The task covers the Plan's override but fails to cover the Spec's requirement, leaving the Spec's FR-004 unimplemented.

Task T026 implements 'run_paired_wilcoxon'. This contradicts Spec FR-004 and SC-001 which explicitly mandate 'independent-sample statistical significance testing (Welch's t-test or Mann-Whitney U)' and forbid paired tests. The task covers the Plan's override but fails to cover the Spec's requirement, leaving the Spec's FR-004 unimplemented.

Task T005 fetches OQMD (Band Gap, Formation Energy) and AFLOW (Thermal Conductivity). Spec FR-001 requires 'Materials Project (elastic modulus)'. The Plan substitutes Formation Energy for Elastic Modulus, but the task does not explicitly cover the Spec's requirement for Elastic Modulus, leaving FR-001 partially unimplemented as written.
